text.title: Fitness Functions as Code Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of fitness-functions-as-code. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Fitness test contains 'this should be modular' as a comment with no executable check.
antipattern.root-cause: Author wrote prose instead of code.
antipattern.fix: Reject any fitness file without an executable assertion + threshold.

antipattern.symptom: Latency fitness flakes 30% of runs; team disables it.
antipattern.root-cause: No warm-up, no pinned load profile.
antipattern.fix: Pin input corpus; warm-up phase; require 5/5 consecutive green to gate.

antipattern.symptom: Fitness test references deleted ADR; nobody maintains it.
antipattern.fix: Validator follows ADR link; orphans flagged for deletion.
